hindiTranslation: उन भक्तोंपर कृपा करनेके लिये ही उनके स्वरूप होनेपन में रहनेवाला मैं उनके अज्ञानजन्य अन्धकारको देदीप्यमान ज्ञानरूप दीपकके द्वारा सर्वथा नष्ट कर देता हूँ ॥
englishTranslation: To show them compassion, I destroy the darkness born of ignorance with the shining lamp of knowledge, dwelling in their own being.
essence: Compassion becomes knowledge that burns away inner darkness.
speaker: Krishna
